news.title: Super Micro shares tank 25% after employees charged with smuggling Nvidia chips to China
news.summary: The U.S. government has been trying to crack down on illegal shipments of top-tier Nvidia artificial intelligence chips to China. The chips are used to build artificial intelligence systems.

news.title: Trump admin. unveils national AI policy framework to limit state power
news.summary: AI industry leaders have opposed state-level regulatory efforts. They argue that a "patchwork" of laws would hobble innovation and give China a competitive edge.

news.title: Fed Governor Waller urges caution for now, says rate cuts possible later in the year
news.summary: Waller said recent developments require a more conservative approach. Waller said in a CNBC interview that recent developments need a 'more conservative approach'

news.title: U.S. says Cuba is prohibited from taking Russian oil as two tankers head to island
news.summary: The fuel-starved Caribbean island is facing its biggest test since the collapse of the Soviet Union under a U.S. oil blockade.

news.title: Trump invokes emergency powers with $23 billion in Gulf arms sales as Iran war wages on: WSJ report
news.summary: The U.S. approved roughly $23 billion in weapons sales to three Gulf nations. The move was to bolster their defenses as the Middle East war continued to escalate.

news.title: Unilever shift to beauty proceeds with talks to sell division that sells mayonnaise and Marmite
news.summary: The consumer-goods company has been making efforts to focus on its beauty and well-being products. The company has also been focusing on its health and fitness products.

news.title: Markets are getting closer to a buying opportunity as investors capitulate, says Bank of America strategist
news.summary: The pressure on Trump to deescalate in the Middle East is building. Markets need to be convinced oil is back below $100 forgood before they can rally.

news.title: ‘Selling will be a very difficult process’: My mom, 93, owns a timeshare in Florida. How can I disclaim this inheritance?
news.summary: “I want to address this issue proactively before it becomes urgent,” he says. “I’m not going to wait for something to become urgent.”

news.title: ‘The money is tax-free’: I’m 76 and won $50,000 in a settlement related to cancer from nuclear waste. What should I do with it?
news.summary: “The money is tax-free and does not affect our income, which comes from investments and Social Security,” she says.

news.title: Fed’s Waller says he doesn’t support rate hikes, sees inflation cooling in the second half of the year
news.summary: If oil prices stay high for months, they could bleed through to other prices, Fed governor Christopher Waller says. Waller is a former Fed governor and a member of the Federal Reserve Board.
